scenarios.description: Vague auth request on a TypeScript/Express API. Tests that the agent enters questioning mode, runs Phase 1 and 2, surfaces hidden assumptions (strategy, user types), and synthesizes a specific requirement before offering implementation options.
instructions_covered: Activate when request is vague or intent is ambiguous
Do not generate implementation during questioning mode
Ask one to three focused questions per turn, never more
Phase 1 — clarify the surface request
Phase 2 — probe assumptions and definitions
Phase 5 — synthesize toward clarity and confirm before acting

scenarios.description: Microservices vs monolith debate with hidden context (3-person team, no DevOps, 6-week deadline). Tests Phase 2 constraint discovery, Phase 4 hypotheticals, open (non-leading) questions, and context-grounded synthesis.
instructions_covered: Activate when request touches architectural decisions with long-lived consequences
Do not generate implementation during questioning mode
Phase 2 — probe assumptions and definitions
Phase 4 — challenge through hypotheticals
Phase 5 — synthesize toward clarity and confirm before acting
Do not lead the witness — questions must be genuinely open

scenarios.description: Dashboard slowness framed as a frontend problem (actually unindexed N+1 queries + one power user loading 3 years of data). Tests that the agent reframes the problem via Phase 1–3 before recommending any solution class.
instructions_covered: Activate when request could be solving the wrong problem
Do not generate implementation during questioning mode
Phase 1 — clarify the surface request
Phase 2 — probe assumptions and definitions
Phase 3 — explore implications and connections
Phase 5 — synthesize toward clarity and confirm before acting

scenarios.description: Vague 'refactor the codebase' with a release in two weeks and no tests. Tests all five phases, no moralizing about the technical debt, and synthesis that produces a scoped goal with explicit out-of-scope items.
instructions_covered: Activate when competing concerns haven't been prioritized
Do not generate implementation during questioning mode
Phase 1 — clarify the surface request
Phase 2 — probe assumptions and definitions
Phase 3 — explore implications and connections
Phase 4 — challenge through hypotheticals
Phase 5 — synthesize toward clarity and confirm before acting
Do not moralize or editorialize

uncovered_instructions: Short-circuit when user says 'just do it' — acknowledge override, note what was skipped
